what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links the design-source channel to an image asset located at image://design-source/capital-raise/p-02.
observations: YAML frontmatter with no body content
target is an image:// URI pointing to capital-raise/p-02
conventions: Follows an att-* id naming convention
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone
References an asset via a custom image:// URI scheme
concerns: The image asset is referenced by URI but not present in the file
No description, alt text, or author is provided
notes: A timestamped design-source channel attachment pointing to an image in the capital-raise path.
questions: What visual content does capital-raise/p-02 contain?
Who added this attachment and why?
How is this image used by the design-source channel?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as an attachment record matches what it does: it records a typed link to an image asset.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to catalog an image asset within a design channel so it can be retrieved, referenced, or audited later.
contribution: This file contributes a timestamped, typed reference that preserves the existence and location of an image asset associated with the design-source channel.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file that records an image reference from the design-source channel to image://design-source/capital-raise/p-02 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and preserve a link to a design-source image asset for retrieval and provenance.
